extortion.description: www.pcchandraindia.com https://www.zoominfo.com/c/pc-chandra-jewellers/357942698 Started in 1939 with its first showroom in Bowbazaar, North Kolkata by the Late Shri Purna Chandra Chandra, now, it has its presence all over India and also abroad. A wedding in West Bengal is incomplete without the artistic designs and fine craftsmanship of P C Chandra Jewellers. Over these decades, it has 44 showrooms, 12 showrooms in Kolkata city(under KMC), has spread its wings across 25 towns in West Bengal and 7 cities in India - Agartala, Bhubaneswar, Delhi, Noida, Bangalore, Jamshedpur and Mumbai. Crossing over geographical boundaries, the PC Chandra Jewellers also has an e-commerce site for buying online. Though steeped in tradition, P C Chandra Jewellers has brought in modernity in its approach to cater to the today's women. Its cutting edge communication and domination of the media scene has made P C Chandra Jewellers the biggest jewellery house in Eastern India.
